entry_points.name: devil-app CLI proof
entry_points.summary: Current runnable app entry point; opens workspace/file and accepts :w/:q.

entry_points.name: xtask check-deps
entry_points.summary: Governance command for dependency policy, protocol symbols, phase evidence, and boundary checks.

apis.name: AppComposition
apis.summary: Composition root exposing workspace/file open, edit, dispatch, save, projection, AI, plugin, collaboration, and remote helpers.

apis.name: CommandDispatchIntent
apis.summary: Typed UI intent enum emitted by projection-only shell input handling.

apis.name: ShellProjectionSnapshot
apis.summary: Top-level UI projection snapshot consumed by shell/rendering surfaces.

apis.name: WorkspaceActor
apis.summary: Workspace authority for VFS, path checks, watcher state, and proposal-mediated file mutations.

apis.name: EditorEngine
apis.summary: Editor engine for buffers, transactions, undo/redo, save DTOs, and viewport projections.

modules.name: devil-protocol
modules.summary: Shared DTO and port contract layer.

modules.name: devil-ui
modules.summary: Projection-only UI state and command intent crate.

modules.name: devil-app
modules.summary: Application composition root and CLI proof support.

modules.name: devil-project
modules.summary: Workspace VFS, path policy integration, tree, watcher, and proposal-mediated file mutation authority.

modules.name: devil-editor
modules.summary: Editor buffer, transaction, viewport, snapshot, and save request engine.

modules.name: devil-text
modules.summary: Rope-backed text model and immutable snapshot substrate.

modules.name: devil-security
modules.summary: Trust, path, command, provider, network, and capability policies.

modules.name: devil-observability
modules.summary: Metadata-only audit and event envelope helpers.

modules.name: devil-storage
modules.summary: Storage repository abstractions and in-memory/file-backed persistence.

modules.name: devil-index
modules.summary: Semantic indexing and query metadata fabric.

tests.name: workspace_vfs_integration
tests.summary: App/workspace/editor/proposal integration tests for VFS, save, conflict, projections, AI/plugin/collaboration/remote surfaces.

tests.name: dto_contracts
tests.summary: Protocol DTO and validation contract tests.

tests.name: editor performance and retention
tests.summary: Editor atomicity, retention, snapshot lease, and performance tests.

tests.name: path policy and watcher recovery
tests.summary: Workspace path boundary and watcher overflow/recovery tests.

tests.name: xtask governance tests
tests.summary: Dependency policy, phase acceptance, projection-only UI, and proposal-mediated save guard tests.

config.name: dependency policy
config.summary: Parsed by xtask; keep synchronized with allowed dependencies and protocol symbols.

config.name: repository instructions
config.summary: Authoritative local instructions for phase gates and architectural boundaries.

dependencies.name: devil-protocol fan-in
dependencies.summary: Central shared dependency for almost all crates.

dependencies.name: devil-app fan-in
dependencies.summary: Composition root depending on most runtime crates.

dependencies.name: GUI dependency gap
dependencies.summary: No active GUI renderer dependency exists in UI or app crates.

ownership.name: UI projection boundary
ownership.summary: UI consumes snapshots and emits intents only.

ownership.name: Proposal-mediated save boundary
ownership.summary: Save path flows through editor DTO, app proposal, workspace proposal apply, and audit.

ownership.name: Workspace path authority
ownership.summary: WorkspaceActor owns root normalization and path containment checks.

risk_areas.name: No GUI renderer
risk_areas.summary: Fully functional IDE requires a renderer-backed desktop shell; current UI is projection/plain shell only.

risk_areas.name: Large protocol/app monoliths
risk_areas.summary: High fan-in large files make broad refactors risky.

risk_areas.name: Renderer ADR/evidence reconciliation
risk_areas.summary: Planning docs and SPIKE-001A evidence require reconciliation before production GUI work.
